data.scene: The app periodically collects battery and power state data in the background.
data.purpose: Provide battery diagnostics and enable power-related automations (e.g., trigger power-saving mode when battery drops below 20%).
data.item: Battery level (%), charging status, charger type, battery health, temperature (Celsius), power consumption (watts), remaining charge time
data.frequency: Periodic (every 15 minutes by default) and on battery state change
data.thirdparty: No third-party data sharing; data sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Battery Sensors -> Enable/Disable

permissions.name: ACTIVITY_RECOGNITION
permissions.scene: When enabling the activity recognition sensor or step counter sensor on Android 10+
permissions.purpose: Detect user's motion state (walking, running, driving, cycling, still) and read step counter data
permissions.impact: If denied, the activity recognition and step counter sensors will not work

permissions.name: ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
permissions.scene: When enabling WiFi SSID/BSSID sensors on Android 9+
permissions.purpose: Read WiFi network SSID and BSSID (required by Android for WiFi scanning on API 29+)
permissions.impact: If denied, WiFi SSID and BSSID sensors will not report data; network type sensor may still work

permissions.name: READ_PHONE_STATE
permissions.scene: When enabling phone state sensors (call state, SIM info, signal strength)
permissions.purpose: Read call state, SIM carrier information, and cellular signal strength
permissions.impact: If denied, phone state sensors (call state, SIM info, signal strength) will not work

permissions.name: BLUETOOTH_CONNECT
permissions.scene: When enabling Bluetooth sensors on Android 12+
permissions.purpose: Scan for connected/paired Bluetooth devices and read device names and MAC addresses
permissions.impact: If denied, Bluetooth sensor data will not be available

permissions.name: BLUETOOTH_SCAN
permissions.scene: When enabling BLE beacon monitoring on Android 12+
permissions.purpose: Scan for nearby BLE iBeacons to detect beacon proximity
permissions.impact: If denied, BLE beacon monitoring sensor will not work

data.scene: The app collects activity recognition data via Google Play Services.
data.purpose: Detect user's motion state for occupancy and activity-based automation rules.
data.item: Detected activity type (still, walking, running, in_vehicle, on_bicycle, tilting, unknown) and confidence level
data.thirdparty: Google Play Services performs on-device activity recognition; results are sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Activity Recognition Sensor -> Enable/Disable

data.scene: The app collects step count data from the device's hardware step counter.
data.purpose: Track cumulative daily step count for health dashboard display and automation.
data.item: Cumulative step count since last device boot
data.frequency: Periodic (updated on each sensor update cycle)
data.thirdparty: No third-party data sharing; data sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Steps Sensor -> Enable/Disable

data.scene: The app collects WiFi network connectivity information.
data.purpose: Enable location-aware automations triggered by WiFi connection (e.g., arriving home scene).
data.item: Currently connected WiFi SSID, BSSID (router MAC), local IP address, public IP address, network type (4G/5G/WiFi)
data.frequency: Periodic and on network state change
data.thirdparty: No third-party data sharing; data sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server. SSID/BSSID read requires ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION on Android 9+.
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Network Sensors -> Enable/Disable

data.scene: The app collects phone state, SIM, and signal strength information.
data.purpose: Provide phone state diagnostics and enable cellular-based automation rules.

data.frequency: Periodic and on phone state change
data.thirdparty: No third-party data sharing; data sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server. Requires READ_PHONE_STATE permission.
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Phone State Sensors -> Enable/Disable

permissions.name: ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
permissions.scene: When enabling WiFi SSID/BSSID sensors on Android 9+
permissions.purpose: Read WiFi network SSID and BSSID (required by Android for WiFi scanning on API 29+)
permissions.impact: If denied, WiFi SSID and BSSID sensors will not report data; network type sensor may still work

permissions.name: READ_PHONE_STATE
permissions.scene: When enabling phone state sensors (call state, SIM info, signal strength)
permissions.purpose: Read call state, SIM carrier information, and cellular signal strength
permissions.impact: If denied, phone state sensors (call state, SIM info, signal strength) will not work

permissions.name: BLUETOOTH_CONNECT
permissions.scene: When enabling Bluetooth sensors on Android 12+
permissions.purpose: Scan for connected/paired Bluetooth devices and read device names and MAC addresses
permissions.impact: If denied, Bluetooth sensor data will not be available

permissions.name: BLUETOOTH_SCAN
permissions.scene: When enabling BLE beacon monitoring on Android 12+
permissions.purpose: Scan for nearby BLE iBeacons to detect beacon proximity
permissions.impact: If denied, BLE beacon monitoring sensor will not work
